title: bidens grandiflora var. humilis
intro: Bidens grandiflora var. humilis, also known as low-lying bidens, is a variety of the Bidens grandiflora plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have medicinal value in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Bidens grandiflora var. humilis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its possible use in treating conditions such as arthritis and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Bidens grandiflora var. humilis is often used in infusions, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
